posts.author: medvajayroblico (Jay Anton Roblico)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi everyone,

I’m trying to connect a Monday board to Power Automate using a webhook, but my flow never gets triggered. I always get this error:

The provided URL has not returned the requested challenge.

I know that I have to use response with challenge as body, but the flow doesn’t even got trigger.

Has anyone encountered this issue or found a workaround?

Thanks in advance!

posts.author: medvajayroblico (Jay Anton Roblico)
posts.cookedHtml: I was able to fix this, by making sure that the trigger ‘When HTTP Request is Received’ set to enable to trigger ‘anyone’ then add a request action passing the Body from the trigger and make sure that it’s synchronous in settings.
